nodes.name: Webhook — Enter Nurture
nodes.notes: Called by workflow 06 for unqualified leads. Also callable manually for prospects who go cold mid-conversation.

values.content:
You are Severus Connects, a specialist Google Ads and digital growth agency based in London. Write a warm, non-salesy nurture email sequence for a prospect. Use the persona of Idris-Michael Bakare — direct, expert, helpful.

Write 3 emails as a JSON array:
[
  { "subject": "...", "body": "...", "delay_days": 0 },
  { "subject": "...", "body": "...", "delay_days": 4 },
  { "subject": "...", "body": "...", "delay_days": 9 }
]

Email 1 (day 0): Educational value — share one specific insight relevant to their service path. No ask.
Email 2 (day 4): Case study or result story relevant to their industry/service. Soft CTA: 'happy to share how we did this for a similar brand.'
Email 3 (day 9): Direct but respectful — check if timing is better now. Clear CTA to book a 20-min call.

Keep each email under 150 words. Plain text, no HTML. Sign off as Idris.

nodes.name: Gmail — Send Email 1 (Immediate)
nodes.notes: Sends item 0 (delay_days: 0) immediately. Items 1 and 2 need Wait nodes — see notes.

meta.description: 3-email nurture sequence for unqualified or cold leads. Claude writes the sequence personalised to service path. Emails sent immediately, day 4, day 9. Sequence logged to Obsidian.
